lawName: Sexual Harassment of Women at Workplace (Prevention, Prohibition and Redressal) Act, 2013
authority: Ministry of Women and Child Development
overview: Provides protection against sexual harassment of women at the workplace and establishes mechanisms for prevention, prohibition and redressal.

definitions.definition: A woman alleging sexual harassment at a workplace under the Act.
Person responsible for management, supervision and control of the workplace.
Workplace as defined under the POSH Act.

rules.title: Adopt a POSH Policy
rules.description: Adopt and communicate a policy prohibiting sexual harassment at the workplace.

rules.title: Constitute Internal Committee Where Applicable
rules.description: Constitute an Internal Committee where the statutory threshold is met.

rules.title: Conduct POSH Awareness Programmes
rules.description: Conduct periodic awareness and sensitisation programmes for employees.

rules.title: Display Statutory Notices
rules.description: Display notices relating to prohibition of sexual harassment and complaint mechanisms.

rules.title: Maintain Complaint Records
rules.description: Maintain records relating to complaints, inquiries and actions taken in accordance with statutory requirements.

rules.title: Submit Annual Reporting Where Applicable
rules.description: Complete annual reporting obligations relating to the Internal Committee wherever applicable.

exceptions.title: Internal Committee Threshold
exceptions.description: Constitution of an Internal Committee depends upon the statutory threshold prescribed under the Act.
